name: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseSwitchStateGlobal
title: coTfsLssAddMasterResponseSwitchStateGlobal
description: This function adds a single LSS Master request wait condition to the internal list of LSS Master request wait conditions.

parameters.name: modeMask
parameters.description: Mask for mode; set bits are compared, not set bits are not compared.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
